review_notes: The functions are generally well-mapped to Kubernetes security controls related to monitoring privileged users. However, the naming can be improved for specificity and clarity regarding the focus on privileged users. The changes ensure the function names clearly reflect their purpose in monitoring privileged user activities.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names explicitly mention 'privileged users' where applicable to align with the control's focus.
title: System Monitoring - System monitoring | privileged users implement the following additional monitori
step1_reasoning: The control SI-4(20) focuses on monitoring privileged users, which can be mapped to Kubernetes audit logging and RBAC configurations. Kubernetes audit logs can track actions performed by privileged users, and ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured is crucial. Additionally, RBAC can be used to identify and monitor privileged users, and admission controllers can be configured to log actions taken by these users.
